title: scry analysis-result (invariant contract v1)
description: Stable, versioned JSON form of scry's `analysis-result` (crates/scry-analyzer/wit/scry.wit). Published for downstream optimizers (loom) and verifiers (witness) so they can consume scry invariants without coupling to scry's WIT bindings. FEAT-008. This schema is the serialized form of the existing InvariantBundle / CallGraph / FunctionSummaries types; it introduces no new types.

diagnostics.description: WIT field `analysis-result.diagnostics: list<diagnostic>`. Optional in the contract: loom does not consume diagnostics, but they may be present.

provenance.description: WIT field `analysis-result.provenance: option<component-provenance>` (FEAT-002). Optional in the contract: present only when the analyzed module carried a well-formed `component-provenance` custom section emitted by meld. A v0.6 document with no provenance still validates.

schema.description: JSON-schema URI this document conforms to. Held constant per scry minor version; v1 must be the contract id.

module-sha256.description: SHA-256 of the analyzed module bytes, lowercase hex.

points.description: Per-program-point invariants. Order is not significant.

program-point.description: WIT record `program-point`: invariants at one (func-index, pc).

func-index.description: Index of the function in the module.

pc.description: Program counter (byte offset within the function body).

locals.description: Abstract values for the locals tracked at this point.

local-invariant.description: WIT record `local-invariant`: abstract value for one local.

interval.description: WIT record `interval` (from pulseengine:wasm-lattice/domain): inclusive integer range [lo, hi] over s64.

region.description: WIT record `region-pointer-payload`: a memory-region pointer (FEAT-005). region-id plus a byte-offset interval into that region.

offset.description: Byte offset within the region, as an interval.

abstract-value.description: WIT variant `abstract-value`, encoded as a `kind`-tagged union. Exactly one case applies.

oneOf.description: region-pointer(region-pointer-payload): pointer into a memory region.
unknown: top of the abstract domain.

diagnostic.description: WIT record `diagnostic`: a non-fatal note emitted alongside the invariant bundle.

call-edge.description: WIT record `call-edge`: one resolved call site (FEAT-006).

caller-func.description: Index of the function containing this call site.

indirect.description: true for call_indirect, false for a direct call.

resolved-targets.description: Resolved target function indices. A singleton sound set permits devirtualization. Empty means provably unreachable.

soundness.description: WIT enum `soundness-tag`. `sound`: a sound (possibly over-approximating) cover of every reachable target. `unsound-fallback`: conservative fallback retained for constructs the analyzer cannot resolve soundly.

code-range.description: WIT record `code-range` (FEAT-032 / SCPV v3): a function body's byte span in the fused module, for DWARF address remapping.

fusion-premises.description: WIT record `fusion-premises` (FEAT-032 / scry#63): facts meld asserts by construction after fusion, usable as sound analysis assumptions.

bounded-memory.description: No `memory.grow` in the fused core → fixed linear memory.

closed-world.description: All cross-component imports internalised → no external mutation between components.

component-origin.description: WIT record `component-origin` (FEAT-002 / FEAT-032 / DD-002): one fused-module function's origin. Decoded from meld's `component-provenance` custom section (binary format `SCPV` v3, defined by the scry-provenance crate).

fused-func-index.description: Function index in the fused Core Wasm module — the key program-point.func-index / call-edge.caller-func are also keyed by.

component-id.description: Identifier of the originating component (meld's string id, FEAT-032 / v3). Only equality / labelling is meaningful.

orig-func-index.description: Function index within the originating component, before fusion.

code-range.description: Byte span of the function body in the fused module, if meld recorded it (FEAT-032 / v3); null otherwise.

component-provenance.description: WIT record `component-provenance` (FEAT-002 / FEAT-032): the decoded `SCPV` v3 section meld emitted for a fused module — fusion premises, module-binding hash, and function-origin map.

premises.description: Fusion premises meld asserts by construction (v3 header).

fused-module-sha256.description: SHA-256 of the fused module (32 raw bytes), binding the section to its module.

origins.description: One entry per fused-module function meld recorded, in file order.

func-index.description: Absolute function index the summary describes.

result-summary.description: Abstract value of each function result under the context-insensitive (top-input) summary, in result order.

context-sensitive.description: True iff the analyzer also applies a context-sensitive re-evaluation at call sites with concrete argument intervals.

recursive.description: True iff the function is in a non-trivial call-graph SCC (self- or mutually-recursive).
